title: avenula marginata subsp. gaditana
intro: Avenula marginata subsp. gaditana, also known as slender false oat-grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions due to its soothing and calming effects. Avenula marginata subsp. gaditana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal benefits to be harnessed and utilized for overall well-being.
